## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `test` — adding or correcting tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependencies, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Linting passes locally (`make lint`)
- [ ] dbt models compile (`dbt parse` or `make dbt-compile`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] I added/updated dbt schema tests if I touched a model
- [ ] I updated the README if behavior or setup steps changed

## Related issue / context

<!-- Link to issue, ADR, or describe context if there's no issue. -->
